name: Smoked Sausage & Fruit Kebobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hillshire Farm Smoked Sausage (Regular, Beef, Lite or Turkey), cut into bite-sized pieces
1 Green pepper, sliced into square pieces
1 can Pineapple chunks (15 oz) OR 1/2 Fresh pineapple, cut into chucks
1 can Peaches (15 oz) OR 3 Fresh peaches, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. GLAZE: Stir together apricot preserves and Dijon mustard in a small bowl.
2. KEBOBS: Assemble kebobs on skewers, alternating Hillshire Farm Smoked Sausage with peppers, fruit, and onions. If using bamboo skewers, soak them in water for at least 30 minutes before assembling the kebobs to prevent burning.
3. Brush the kebobs with half of the glaze.
4. Grill over medium coals for 5 minutes.
5. Turn the kebobs and brush with the remaining glaze. Continue grilling about 5 more minutes.
6. Total preparation and cooking time: 20 minutes.
